subject: Drilbur — a small mole-like Pokemon with large digging claws, emerging from a dirt burrow
description: A compact, pale-bodied mole-like creature sits at the mouth of a freshly dug burrow, its oversized blade-like claws prominent in the foreground. The excavated hole behind it frames the figure against dark earthy dirt walls. The creature's small dark eyes and snout are visible. Warm brown and tan tones dominate the scene, evoking freshly turned soil and underground space.
foreground: small mole-like creature with large digging claws at the edge of a burrow hole
background: dark earthy dirt walls of an excavated tunnel or burrow
emotion: alert, ready to dig — body positioned forward with claws raised
